description.en: Audit every FastAPI endpoint in your company monorepo backend: classify serialization state, document findings in docs/serialization-audit.md, add explicit Pydantic response_model and separate input schemas, and verify via tests and /docs.
description.es: Audita cada endpoint FastAPI del backend en tu monorepo: clasifica el estado de serialización, documenta en docs/serialization-audit.md, añade response_model Pydantic explícitos y esquemas de entrada separados, y verifica con tests y /docs.

sharing.en: I just completed Backend Serialization Audit with LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy. Check it out: https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/ai-engineering-syllabus/tree/main/content/projects/ai-eng-backend-serialization #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #fastapi #pydantic #python
